# TOP(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  top — display running processes and system load

## SYNOPSIS
  top

## DESCRIPTION
Shows a real-time overview of running processes, CPU usage, and memory
utilization on the current node.

## EXAMPLES
  top
  ps aux | grep nexus

## SEE ALSO
  ps, kill, free, uptime
